---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yazid-janati-414a4a1b7/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/yazidjanati

---

I am currently a second year PhD student in Statistics at Télécom SudParis - Institut Polytechnique de Paris. I am advised by [Sylvain Le Corff](https://sylvainlc.github.io) and [Yohan Petetin](http://www-public.imtbs-tsp.eu/~petetin/).
